meta.note: Edit questions and answers here. The booking FAQ auto-includes contact details from company-info.json and booking-links.json.

service.title: Frequently asked questions
service.subtitle: Quick answers before you book. Reach out anytime if you need something specific.

bookingFaq.question: How do I book The Game Hour?

items.question: Which areas do you serve?
items.answer: We organize events across Gujarat including Ahmedabad, Gandhinagar, Rajkot, Vadodara, Surat, and Anand. We travel to your venue.

items.question: What age groups can participate?
items.answer: Our games are designed for all ages, from toddlers to seniors, with age-appropriate activities tailored to your event.

items.question: How do I book The Game Hour?
Do you offer corporate team-building programs?
items.answer: Yes. Our corporate packages focus on collaboration, communication, and morale through facilitated games suited for offsites, annual days, and team events.

items.question: Can games be customized for our event theme?
items.answer: Absolutely. We tailor game selection, hosting style, and props to match birthdays, weddings, festivals, Bollywood nights, and corporate goals.
